title: hieracium armerioides subsp. touvetii
intro: Hieracium armerioides subsp. touvetii, also known as a lesser hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family (Asteraceae) native to Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which make it useful for treating wounds and skin issues. The health benefits of Hieracium armerioides subsp. touvetii include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting wound healing, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
